title: Duplicate task
prompt: Add a `duplicateTask(id: string): Task` method to TaskService that creates a copy of an existing task with a new UUID, resets status to 'todo', preserves all other fields, and throws if the source task doesn't exist.

title: Sort tasks
prompt: Add a `sortTasks(tasks: Task[], by: 'priority' | 'dueDate' | 'createdAt', dir?: 'asc' | 'desc'): Task[]` utility function to taskService.ts. For dueDate, tasks without a due date should always sort last. Default direction is 'asc'.

title: Bulk status update
prompt: Add a `bulkUpdateStatus(ids: string[], status: TaskStatus): { updated: number; notFound: string[] }` method to TaskService. It should update all matching tasks and return counts — do not throw on missing ids, collect them instead.

title: Due-soon filter
prompt: Add a `getDueSoonTasks(hours: number): Task[]` method to TaskService that returns active (non-done, non-cancelled) tasks whose dueDate falls within the next N hours, sorted by priority ascending (1 = most urgent).

title: Refactor status/assignee getters
prompt: Refactor `getTasksByStatus` and `getTasksByAssignee` in TaskService to delegate to `filterTasks` instead of having their own filter logic. The public API and return types must remain identical.
